title: Returning to Ghana
body: "The Home Office offers help after you return to Ghana if:   you have no legal right to remain in the UK you either choose to return home (voluntary return) or are being returned   We can help you when you arrive and for up to 12 months after you return.  You can still use the reintegration service if you have already received help from the Voluntary Returns Service (VRS) or the Facilitated Returns Scheme (FRS). "
